title: Backend Tracing
description: ClickHouse trace explorer (distributed tracing, OTel → OTel Collector → ClickHouse analytics.otel_traces). Phase 6 (06-02) repointed this dashboard off Tempo onto the ClickHouse datasource (uid aenigma-clickhouse, grafana-clickhouse-datasource OTel trace builder) as part of the gated observability consolidation. Parity note: Tempo's TraceQL ('{ duration > 1s }') has no direct equivalent in ClickHouse; the slow-trace use case is expressed via SQL (WHERE Duration > 1e9 ns over analytics.otel_traces). The 'Recent slow traces' panel is a TABLE list (the Grafana 'traces' viz renders only a single trace's span waterfall, not a list) — click a TraceId to open that trace's full waterfall in a split Explore view via an internal data link. The per-service latency-p95 and 5xx-rate timeseries that used to live here were exact duplicates of the 'Service Overview' row in 'Services / Overview' (animeenigma-services) — removed 2026-06-03. Use that dashboard for RED metrics; use this one to drill into individual slow traces.

panels.title: Recent slow traces (>1s) — click a TraceId to open its waterfall

query.rawSql: WITH '${__value.raw}' as trace_id, (SELECT min(Start) FROM "otel_traces_trace_id_ts" WHERE TraceId = trace_id) as trace_start, (SELECT max(End) + 1 FROM "otel_traces_trace_id_ts" WHERE TraceId = trace_id) as trace_end SELECT "TraceId" as traceID, "SpanId" as spanID, "ParentSpanId" as parentSpanID, "ServiceName" as serviceName, "SpanName" as operationName, "Timestamp" as startTime, multiply("Duration", 0.000001) as duration, arrayMap(key -> map('key', key, 'value', "SpanAttributes"[key]), mapKeys("SpanAttributes")) as tags, arrayMap(key -> map('key', key, 'value', "ResourceAttributes"[key]), mapKeys("ResourceAttributes")) as serviceTags FROM "otel_traces" WHERE traceID = trace_id AND startTime >= trace_start AND startTime <= trace_end AND Duration > 0 ORDER BY Timestamp DESC, Duration DESC LIMIT 1000

targets.rawSql: SELECT TraceId AS traceID, ServiceName AS serviceName, SpanName AS operationName, Timestamp AS startTime, Duration / 1000000 AS duration FROM analytics.otel_traces WHERE ParentSpanId = '' AND Duration > 1000000000 AND Timestamp >= $__fromTime AND Timestamp <= $__toTime ORDER BY Timestamp DESC LIMIT 50
